name: OnboardedApp
description: OnboardedApp schema from Palo Alto Networks SaaS Security Posture Management API

app_id.description: Unique identifier for the onboarded application.

display_name.description: Human-readable name for the onboarded application instance.

tenant_id.description: Tenant or domain identifier within the SaaS application.

check_summary.description: Summary counts of posture check results by severity.

last_scanned_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent posture scan.

onboarded_at.description: Timestamp when the application was onboarded.
